subject: Fwd: INVITE NY OBSERVER 25TH ANNIVERSARY
body:
Dear Mr. Jeffrey Epstein

Jared Kushner, New York's youngest powerhouse publisher, is celebrating the **25th Anniversary of the New York Observer on Thursday, March 14th.**

**Mayor Michael Bloomberg will be by his side to toast you all.**

The Observer is honoring those who have defined and shaped New York since 1987. They are celebrating the cities best, brightest and most influential in culture, media and finance. The salmon pink pages are revered among New York's elite as the preeminent voice on power.

The celebration is going to be one of those quintessential New York nights. We are looking forward to seeing you.

xoxo,
Peggy

***

**Jared Kushner, Publisher Joseph Meyer, CEO**

Cory Booker Arthur Carter Georgina Chapman Katie Couric Lauren Santo Domingo
Larry Gagosian Mariska Hargitay Carolina Herrera Katie Holmes Woody Johnson
Peter Kaplan Comm. Ray Kelly Ken Kurson Matt Lauer Blake Lively Terry Lundgren
Peter Martins Cynthia McFadden Sean Parker Ron O. Perelman Stephen Schwarzman
Lara Spencer Steve Tisch Donald Trump Ivanka Trump Harvey Weinstein George C. Wolfe

cordially invite you to join them at

# THE NEW YORK OBSERVER

## 25TH ANNIVERSARY

**Thursday March 14th, 2013**

6:30-9:30pm
Cocktails & Light Supper

The Four Season Restaurant
99 East 52nd Street
New York City

█████████████████████████████████████████

cocktail attire
